initial_query: Dear Akshay, we are excited to announce that you have been selected for Software Engineering Intern at Microsoft. Please fill the application form to complete your onboarding. Regards, Namrita, HR Recruiter

Hello Colin, We have a great opportunity at Lite Media for the position of Digital Marketing Manager. Please click the link below to apply and pay a one-time processing fee of 500 rupees: http://litmedia/2334/ip6kj
Hi, I'm Hannah from HR Recruitment at Digi-Soln Tech. The job is to subscribe to YouTube channels and send screenshots. Earn ₹100 per task and up to ₹15000-20000 monthly.
Dear Akshay, Thank you for applying to the Software Engineering Intern role. We would like to invite you for the next round. Please log in to your candidate portal to select an interview slot.
Hi Rohan, this is Priya from TechNova HR. We received your application for the Data Analyst role. Are you available for a screening call tomorrow?
Hello, this is the official hiring channel for Digi-Soln Tech. Please apply through our website www.digisoln.in/careers.
Hello Ankit, we came across your profile on LinkedIn and thought you might be a good fit for a Backend Developer role. Please apply through our official website.
Hi Neha, thanks for completing your assessment. We will get back to you within 5-7 business days.
Dear Rahul, Congratulations! You have been selected for the HR Intern role. Please pay a refundable onboarding fee of ₹750 today to confirm your position.
Hello Aman, we are offering a remote data entry job with a salary of ₹40,000 per week. No experience needed. Message us on WhatsApp to start immediately.
Hi, this is from QuickHire Solutions. To verify your application, please share the OTP sent to your phone.
Dear Candidate, you must complete a mandatory training program. Training fee is ₹2000, after which job placement is guaranteed.
Earn ₹5000 daily by liking Instagram posts. No skills required. Pay ₹299 to register.
Dear Applicant, your profile has been selected for a government job. Pay ₹1500 processing fee to secure your position.
Please send your resume along with Aadhaar card and bank details to proceed with hiring.
Urgent hiring today. Salary ₹25,000 per week. Pay ₹500 to reserve your slot immediately.
Earn ₹20,000 weekly from home. Pay ₹999 for registration kit and start today.
You have been referred for a job. Please pay ₹600 referral fee to activate your application.
You have been referred for a role at JPMConst. Please register via our official portal and share your registration ID.
Work from home and earn up to ₹50K per month. No degree, no interview. Limited seats available.
Good evening Rakesh, you have cleared the screening round. Please share your availability for the next interview round.
Meta in collaboration with Scaler is conducting a hackathon. Top teams may get interview opportunities. Visit the official page for details.
Our company is hiring for a Data Engineer role (0-2 years experience). Please apply through our official careers page.
Hi Arjun, are you open to Backend roles? Let me know if you'd like more details.
Reminder: Your interview is scheduled tomorrow at 11 AM. Please join using the link shared earlier.
We are hiring a Frontend Developer with 1–3 years experience. Apply via our careers page.
Hi, we got your resume from LinkedIn. Role is QA Engineer. Send updated CV if interested.
Please complete the online assessment within 3 days. The link has been sent to your email.
Earn guaranteed crypto profits daily. Join by paying ₹1500 training fee.
Your interview is confirmed. Pay ₹300 security deposit to receive the interview link.
Share PAN card, Aadhaar, and bank details to proceed with your job application.
Get internship certificates from top companies without working. Pay ₹499 now.
